description: This is the DMT NAT dogooooo collection.dogooooo was created by SAYoooooh in 2021. It is modeled after the clay figurines (dogu) made in Japan 11,000 years ago. The purpose of their creation remains unknown. However, even without a special reason, humans have an innate desire to create. This is the message of dogooooo.We view DMT NAT as new land, where our precious instincts are embedded.
name: NAT dogooooo
